description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine Docker image. Add a pages job in the default stage that runs only on the master branch, installs py-pip, python-dev and cython with apk, upgrades pip, installs sphinx, sphinx_rtd_theme and numpydoc via pip, changes into the docs directory, installs make with apk, builds the documentation using make html, moves the generated HTML to a public/ directory, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. No caches or services are defined.
